positive: A whimsical watercolor illustration of three friendly forest animals (a fox, a badger, and a squirrel) having a picnic under a giant mushroom. Soft edges, pastel colors, storybook style, gentle lighting, highly detailed fur textures, cozy, sweet, children's book illustration.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, digital painting, sharp edges
